columns.extraction_plan: The total number of participants is 385. This value is reported in the "Abstract" section on page 1, stating "Randomized phase 3 trial of ADT plus D versus ADT alone in 385 mNCPC patients". It is also confirmed in the "Patients and methods" section on page 2: "From October 2004 to December 2008, 385 patients were enrolled including 193 in the ADT arm and 192 in the ADT plus D arm." Additionally, Table 1 on page 3 is titled "Characteristics of the patients (n = 385)", and Table 2 on page 4 includes "All patients n = 385".
